creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Given this issue, can you give the 7.X series a try from FreeBSD? Some
work had been done in various regions that could have affected this and it
would be really neath whether we can either exclude the problem on the
newest versions, or still see that it's broken..

Also; how long did you wait before rebooting? It might be a detection bug
somewhere; would it be possible to issue a "Verbose boot" from the boot
menu, or boot -v if you enter it manually to see where we can get ?

Thanks!

p.s. Please reply-all to this message so that the information gets
recorded in the ticket (to prevent things from vanishing :))

-- 
/"\   Best regards,                      | remko@FreeBSD.org
